prompt:
Declaration (in markdown format):

# CI/CD Pipeline: backend-api

Trigger: on push to main

## Step 1 (parallel)
- Lint (Go)
- Type check (Go)
- Test (ginkgo, coverage min 80%)
- Security scan (snyk)

## Step 2 (if all four pass)
- Build docker image, push to ghcr.io/lambda-run/backend-api
- Deploy to staging with rolling strategy
- Smoke test (60s timeout)
- If smoke test passes: deploy to prod with canary strategy (10%)

## Step 3 (if any failed)
- Notify #deploys in Slack
- Block the merge

Output a flat bullet list manifest of every concrete element this declaration implies.
manifest:
• Trigger: git push event on main branch
• Step 1 runs all four jobs in parallel
• Step 1 job: Lint using Go linter
• Step 1 job: Type check using Go toolchain
• Step 1 job: Test using Ginkgo test framework
• Step 1 job: minimum code coverage threshold of 80%
• Step 1 job: Security scan using Snyk
• Step 2 executes only if all four Step 1 jobs pass
• Step 2 action: build Docker image
• Step 2 action: push Docker image to ghcr.io/lambda-run/backend-api
• Step 2 action: deploy to staging environment
• Step 2 staging deployment strategy: rolling
• Step 2 action: run smoke test against staging
• Step 2 smoke test timeout: 60 seconds
• Step 2 condition: smoke test must pass before proceeding to production deploy
• Step 2 action: deploy to production environment
• Step 2 production deployment strategy: canary
• Step 2 canary initial traffic percentage: 10%
• Step 3 executes if any Step 1 job fails
• Step 3 action: send notification to Slack channel #deploys
• Step 3 action: block the merge (branch protection / merge gate enforcement)
